run_summary.summary: Whisker payment is fully in motion — the Tipalti loop closed this afternoon. After Liz confirmed ACH this morning, Cheyenne replied at 10:34 AM confirming the invoice was submitted to accounting. Whisker then sent a Tipalti vendor portal invite (10:51 AM UTC), Liz registered, and by 11:29 AM UTC the system confirmed her payment details. Going forward: Whisker invoices go to APInvoices@whisker.com (same Tipalti pattern as JLab). JLab also sent a formal 'Tipalti account created successfully' email at 11:15 AM UTC, officially confirming Liz's account is active. Everything is set up on both sides for payments to come in.

suggestions.message: Whisker ACH payment is in process via Tipalti. Invoice was submitted to accounting on Apr 27. Watch for deposit around May 24 (30 days from invoice date Apr 24). Future invoices go to APInvoices@whisker.com — update your invoice workflow.
JLab Tipalti account officially confirmed live by ap@jlabaudio.com. Next invoice should go directly to apinvoice@jlab.com (PDF/JPG/PNG only) — old contact method may no longer route correctly.

deals.next_action: Wait for ACH payment via Tipalti (expected ~May 24)
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz registered on Whisker Tipalti vendor portal (welcome email 11:27 AM UTC, payment details confirmed 11:29 AM UTC). IMPORTANT: Future invoices → APInvoices@whisker.com. Portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/Whisker/account/login. Cheyenne replied at 10:34 AM CDT confirming invoice was submitted to accounting and Tipalti invite was coming. Earlier: Cheyenne asked about payment method (8:45 AM CDT), Liz confirmed ACH works (10:31 AM CDT).
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Whisker Tipalti setup complete. Invoice submitted to accounting by Cheyenne. Liz registered on vendor portal. Future invoices → APInvoices@whisker.com. ACH payment expected ~May 24.

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: ap@jlabaudio.com sent formal 'Tipalti account created successfully' confirmation (11:15 AM UTC). Account active and ready to receive payments. Earlier: JLab invited Liz to Tipalti (8:50 AM CDT), registration completed by 9:15 AM. IMPORTANT: All invoices → apinvoice@jlab.com (PDF/JPG/PNG only). Portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: JLab Tipalti account officially confirmed active by ap@jlabaudio.com. Invoice workflow: apinvoice@jlab.com.
